formulas.name: Ohm's Law
formulas.description: The voltage across a resistor equals the current through it multiplied by its resistance.
formulas.example: If R = 100Ω and I = 0.05A, then V = 0.05 × 100 = 5V

formulas.name: Power Dissipation
formulas.description: The power dissipated by a resistor as heat.
formulas.example: If R = 100Ω and I = 0.1A, then P = 0.01 × 100 = 1W

formulas.name: Series Resistance
formulas.description: Total resistance of resistors connected in series.

formulas.name: Parallel Resistance
formulas.description: Total resistance of resistors connected in parallel.
